description: Moccasin style flat shoes in a greyish blue colour from catwalk. A very feminine shape and cute ruffles make these shoes a must-have for the woman who wants to dress up with style every day. These versatile shoes will go with everything & ndash smart enough to wear to the office and cute enough to wear on a night out.UpperSuede upper with slip-on shapeSynthetic leather lining and padded sockliner for instep comfortFabric gathered into ruffles at the toe box for moccasin styleStrap for style and comfort across the tongueOutsoleNon-slip TPU outsole with grooves for gripshoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
